name: Foot of the Ruined Lighthouse
description: A squat, storm-battered lighthouse rises out of the fog, its white paint long since flayed away to bare, weeping stone. The lamp above has been dark for years. A rusted iron stair spirals up its inside toward the lantern room, and the wreck lies back east through the mist.
night_description: The dead lighthouse is a black finger against a blacker sky. No lamp burns at its crown, yet a faint, cold glow seems to seep from the lantern room far above, up the rusted spiral stair. The wreck is lost in the dark to the east.
ambient_messages: Wind moans through the lighthouse's empty windows high above.
Flakes of rust drift down the spiral stair and settle at your feet.
The old stone weeps a trickle of brine that smells of the deep sea.
